message:
🐛 Add API timeout to prevent slow requests from hanging

- Add 15-second default timeout to all API requests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
- Use AbortController with proper cleanup for timeout handling
- Add clear error messages when requests timeout
- Allow per-request timeout override via options parameter

This fixes cards like Events Timeline and Pod Issues from appearing hung
when backend MCP calls are slow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
